overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character exploring a rainy neon-lit rooftop at night, then descending to street level to mount a motorcycle and drive through the city. The journey transitions from a covered market area under an overpass to high-speed highway driving through the futuristic metropolis with dense neon signage and flying vehicles.

overhead corrugated metal roof structure providing partial cover
dense cluster of skyscrapers with bright neon advertisements and signage

metal staircase descending from rooftop to lower level

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rainy cyberpunk rooftop at night, with the camera walking along a metal-grated platform. A person sleeps on a mattress near the edge while neon-lit skyscrapers tower in the background. Metal railings and a corrugated roof structure frame the view of the sprawling metropolis below.

approaches and mounts the red motorcycle parked under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking down metal stairs and approaching the parked motorcycle

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with support pillars
red sports motorcycle with custom decals parked on wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character descends a metal staircase from the rooftop into a sheltered area beneath a massive concrete overpass. The environment transitions from open sky to enclosed urban space with sparse weeds growing through cracks. The character approaches a red sports motorcycle parked on the wet asphalt and mounts it.

scene_state.functional_zone: informal market stalls beneath highway overpass

events.description: starts motorcycle engine and begins driving through narrow market passages
exits covered market area and enters open elevated highway ramp

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle slowly through narrow market passages under the overpass, navigating between stalls

notable_agents.action: vendor standing near food stall with white umbrella

entered.detail: white market umbrella over food stall with tables and chairs
orange and white concrete construction barriers
steam rising from ground vent creating atmospheric effect

segments.scene_description: Riding the motorcycle through a narrow market area tucked beneath the highway overpass, navigating between food stalls with umbrellas and concrete barriers. The wet asphalt reflects the neon lights from above as the character weaves through the enclosed space before emerging onto an open highway ramp.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with safety barriers

events.description: accelerates onto open highway reaching high speed on wet road
passes under large overhead highway sign gantries

agents.ego_description: accelerating motorcycle along wet elevated highway with neon reflections on pavement

entered.detail: yellow and black striped concrete safety barriers lining both sides of highway
large overhead gantry with highway direction signs
tall street lights illuminating the wet highway surface

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle accelerates onto a wide elevated highway, leaving the covered market behind. Yellow and black safety barriers line both sides of the wet asphalt as the bike gains speed. The camera passes under overhead sign gantries while the city skyline stretches ahead, illuminated by streetlights reflecting off the rain-slicked road.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway approaching dense neon-lit downtown district

events.description: flying AV vehicle passes overhead against the night sky
overtakes white sedan on the right side

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed through neon-lit highway corridor with dense city lights ahead

notable_agents.action: flying AV vehicle with blue lights passing overhead
white sedan being overtaken on the right

entered.detail: futuristic flying vehicle with illuminated blue thrusters
tall buildings covered in bright pink and blue neon advertisements
modern glass facade towers with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Driving at high speed through the heart of the neon-lit city, with dense clusters of skyscrapers and massive digital billboards illuminating the night. A flying AV vehicle passes overhead while the motorcycle overtakes a white sedan. The wet highway continues to reflect the vibrant pink, blue, and purple neon lights from the surrounding mega-structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rainy, elevated rooftop down into the neon-lit depths of a futuristic city. It begins by walking along a metal-grated platform past a sleeping figure, with towering skyscrapers framing the rainy night sky. As the camera descends a metal staircase, the open rooftop gives way to a sheltered urban space beneath a massive concrete overpass where the character mounts a red sports motorcycle on wet asphalt. The scene then shifts into a ride through a narrow market area, weaving between umbrella-covered food stalls and concrete barriers that reflect the surrounding neon glow. Finally, the enclosed space opens up as the motorcycle accelerates away from the overpass and emerges onto an open highway ramp.

The shot follows a continuous high-speed journey that transitions from the sheltered outskirts of a market onto a sprawling, neon-drenched urban highway. It begins as the motorcycle accelerates away from a covered area, gliding past yellow and black safety barriers on wet asphalt under a series of overhead sign gantries. As the bike gains momentum, the environment opens up into the heart of the metropolis, where the city skyline expands into a dense cluster of towering skyscrapers. The scene then shifts into a blur of vibrant pink, blue, and purple light as the camera overtakes a white sedan while a flying AV vehicle passes overhead. Finally, the perspective surges forward through the rain-slicked corridor, with massive digital billboards reflecting off the road surface amidst the surrounding mega-structures.
